title: Number of Operations to Make Network Connected

testcases.input: n = 4, connections = [[0,1],[0,2],[1,2]] Output: 1 Explanation: Remove cable between computer 1 and 2 and place between computers 1 and 3.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: Remove cable between computer 1 and 2 and place between computers 1 and 3.

testcases.input: n = 6, connections = [[0,1],[0,2],[0,3],[1,2]] Output: -1 Explanation: There are not enough cables.
